prompt: FIXED SUBJECT. The attached image is a locked foreground layer. Mask and lock every pixel of the woman and her entire dress: her face, expression, skin, hair, arms; the cream ditsy-floral cotton dress with white lace-trimmed flutter sleeves and neckline, shirred waist and full midi skirt; her shoes, bracelet and jewelry. Reproduce all of that EXACTLY and identically — do not redraw, recolor, restyle, re-pattern, resize or move it, and do not 'clean up' the floral print. Inpaint ONLY the background outside the locked subject. Preserve the original framing; do not crop. Match the new background's light direction and warmth to the light already on her so it composites naturally. Scene: sunny cafe table in a small village in the south of France — sun-warmed peach/apricot plaster facade, weathered sage-green wooden shutters, an old wrought-iron wall lantern, a little climbing greenery, pale cream wrought-iron bistro chairs and a small round cafe table on worn cobblestones. Bright but soft light from the front-left to match the soft light on her; she gazes right.
